overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a horror game showing a character in a green coat exploring an abandoned, dimly lit building. The character moves through a decaying lobby with green walls, enters a dark movie theater, discovers a mysterious seated figure, and exits through a backstage corridor. The atmosphere is tense with dramatic lighting and fog effects typical of modern game engines.

events.description: exits narrow corridor and enters larger lobby area with green walls

agents.ego_description: walking through a dark corridor holding a flashlight, approaching a lobby area

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dimly lit corridor with green walls and concrete pillars. A green exit sign glows in the distance as the character approaches the entrance to a larger lobby area.

events.description: character looks upward at hanging signs from the ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking through the lobby while looking around and examining the ceiling signs

entered.detail: curved reception counter painted green with blue accents
illuminated box signs hanging from ceiling advertising snacks
circular windows emitting diffused light into the lobby
long rectangular skylight in the ceiling with damaged panels
doorway with red frame leading to side room

segments.scene_description: The character explores a large lobby with a distinctive green reception desk and round windows. The camera pans upward to reveal hanging advertising signs and a damaged skylight ceiling, establishing the abandoned, decaying atmosphere of the building.

events.description: enters side room with red couch through open doorway
exits side room and returns to narrow corridor

agents.ego_description: walking into a side lounge area to investigate, then returning to the main corridor

entered.detail: vintage red velvet couch against the wall
wall covered in small square tiles with geometric pattern
furniture covered with white sheet next to the sofa
board with papers and notices pinned to it

segments.scene_description: The character detours into a small side lounge featuring a prominent red tufted sofa against a patterned tile wall. After briefly investigating the room, the character returns to the narrow corridor system, passing a bulletin board on the wall.

events.description: lighting becomes significantly darker as approaching theater entrance

agents.ego_description: walking down a corridor toward a doorway leading into darkness

entered.detail: illuminated green exit sign above theater door
heavy wooden door leading into the theater
movie posters or notices on the corridor wall
metal handrail along the wall

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a narrow corridor with deteriorating walls, passing posters and a staircase railing. The lighting dims significantly as the character approaches a wooden door with a green exit sign, signaling the entrance to the theater.

events.description: enters the dark theater auditorium with rows of red seats
flashlight illuminates a seated figure in the theater seats

agents.ego_description: walking down the theater aisle with flashlight, descending toward the screen, discovering a person sitting in the seats

notable_agents.action: sitting motionless in theater seat, illuminated by flashlight beam

entered.detail: rows of red upholstered theater seats
beam of light from projector booth cutting through darkness
large white cinema screen at the front of the theater
decorative light fixtures on the side walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vast, dark theater auditorium with rows of red seats and a visible projection beam cutting through the darkness. Walking down the sloped aisle, the character's flashlight suddenly illuminates a mysterious seated figure, creating a startling discovery in the otherwise empty theater.

events.description: turns away from the seated figure and begins ascending toward the exit

agents.ego_description: moving past the seated figure and walking up the aisle toward the theater exit stairs

notable_agents.action: remaining seated and motionless as the character passes by

entered.detail: staircase leading up to the theater exit
small window of the projection booth high on the back wall

segments.scene_description: The character continues past the mysterious seated figure, who remains motionless, and begins ascending the theater aisle toward the exit stairs. The projection booth window becomes visible high on the back wall as the character moves toward the doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: backstage corridor with worn concrete walls

events.description: exits the theater through the back door into a narrow corridor
enters narrower passage with exposed concrete and deteriorating walls

agents.ego_description: walking up the stairs and exiting the theater into a narrow backstage corridor with deteriorating walls

entered.detail: doorway leading out of the theater into the corridor
short flight of stairs leading up to the exit
walls covered in vertical wood paneling
exposed deteriorating concrete wall with cracks
metal handrail along the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character exits the theater through the back door, ascending carpeted stairs into a narrow corridor with wood-paneled walls. The environment transitions to a more industrial backstage area with bare concrete walls, metal railings, and visible deterioration, suggesting the character is moving deeper into the abandoned building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a decaying interior that transitions from narrow, oppressive corridors into a cavernous lobby before descending back into dim, claustrophobic hallways. It begins with the character walking through a dimly lit corridor of green walls and concrete pillars, moving toward the glow of a distant exit sign. As the space opens up, the camera expands into a large lobby featuring a green reception desk and round windows, panning upward to reveal hanging advertising signs beneath a damaged skylight. The scene then shifts as the character detours into a small side lounge with a red tufted sofa and patterned tiles before returning to the corridor system past a wall-mounted bulletin board. Finally, the environment grows increasingly dark and deteriorating, passing posters and a staircase railing as the camera approaches a wooden door marked by a green exit sign.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the oppressive darkness of a movie theater into the decaying industrial corridors of a backstage area. It begins as the character enters a vast auditorium, moving down a sloped aisle of red seats where a projection beam cuts through the gloom before a flashlight reveals a mysterious seated figure. As the character passes the motionless figure, the camera ascends the aisle toward the back of the room, bringing a high projection booth window into view. The scene then shifts as the character exits through a back door and climbs carpeted stairs, transitioning from wood-paneled walls into a narrow, industrial hallway. Finally, the environment opens into a deteriorated backstage area characterized by bare concrete walls and metal railings.
